Email: Best guess (unverified): hichem@damacproperties.com verify in Hunter
Other patterns: hichem.troudi@damacproperties.com, htroudi@damacproperties.com

Background

Hichem is an accomplished and multi-award winning digital leader in the AECO industry, known for driving large-scale innovation and transformation across the Middle East’s design and construction sectors. He has held numerous high-impact leadership roles including Digital Practice Director, Regional Digital Practice Leader, Regional BIM Strategy Leader, Regional BIM Manager, and Head of BIM-Controls. As a visionary in digital innovation and delivery, his drive to excellence has been recognized with prestigious awards such as the Digital Visionary of the Year 2025, double awarded the Digital Construction Innovator of the Year award in 2025 and 2024, received the Digital Transformation of the Year Award and has been featured among the Top 10 ConTech Leaders in the Middle East as part of ConFex 2025. With a strong foundation in engineering research and academia, Hichem brings extensive hands-on experience delivering iconic mega and giga projects across diverse sectors: civil infrastructure, buildings, mechanical systems, and energy. His deep expertise spans a broad array of AECO practice areas such ad Digital Design consultancy & Digital Construction management. Hichem has successfully led digital transformation initiatives at the project, departmental, and organizational levels. He is recognized for building and executing strategic roadmaps that integrate Digital Innovation, BIM & VDC, automation, project controls, engineering intelligence, ERP management, organizational change management, supply chain digitalization, and IT systems governance set up backed by direct collaboration with top-tier technology providers. He has additionally been at the forefront of integrating Spatial AI and Data Visualization services into digital delivery and operational platforms, positioning this initiative as a global benchmark for how advanced technologies can redefine decision-making and project intelligence across the built environment. Hichem has authored and implemented innovative processes such as intuitive BIM-Project Controls integration, unmodeled BIM, Automated IPA, BIM 5.5D. His unique blend of technical acumen, software development skills, and systems thinking enables him to create scalable, high-impact digital solutions. Beyond his technical leadership, Hichem is a dedicated mentor and instructor, actively supporting the professional development of AECO talent through mentoring and training programs in relation to AECO industry digitalization. His ongoing contributions continue to shape the future of digital transformation in the built environment.

Background

Global Executive Search & Talent Acquisition Leader with 20+ years of international experience across the US, Europe, MENA, and APAC, leading enterprise-wide talent acquisition for DAMAC Digital, Edgnex Data Centers, and DAMAC Properties. I specialize in building high‑performing leadership, engineering, and mission‑critical teams across data centers, digital infrastructure, hyperscale, colocation, cloud, and deep‑tech ecosystems. My mandate includes supporting DAMAC’s Digital global expansion into next‑generation digital infrastructure, powering greenfield builds, multi‑country rollouts, and large‑scale digital transformation. With 60,000+ first‑degree executive connections and 33,000+ followers, I maintain one of the strongest global talent networks in the digital infrastructure and technology sectors — enabling unparalleled access to elite leaders across engineering, development, construction, operations, critical power, MEP, design, cloud, cybersecurity, AI, Web3, and blockchain. I deliver a 100% fill rate on retained mandates, driven by an intelligence‑led, research‑heavy, and deeply consultative approach. My methodology is engineered for high‑scarcity, high‑impact, and “hard‑to‑hire” technical and executive roles, particularly in data centers and emerging technologies.

Background

• Strategic thinker who can envision, create and implement business plans to drive consistent growth and achieve corporate objectives. • Building & leading top performing teams, creating a positive environment and process driven approach to deliver outstanding team results. • Proven ability to deliver revenue growth, increase market share, expand distribution, create all round training & development for effective team management. • Result oriented under tough market conditions, having the requisite knowledge, competency, experience and aptitude to effectively generate consistent business growth. • Experience of working with different management cultures & multi ethnic teams – multinationals to regional business houses. FMCG Sales Experience: Britannia, Dorset, Ferrero, Fine Hygienic, Hindustan Unilever, Henkel, IFFCO, Kraft, Heinz, Mc'Vities, Mondelez, Nestle, Novalac, Super-Max, Swiss Arabian Perfumes, Yardley. FMCG Category Experience: Baby Food, Biscuits, Cakes, Cereals, Chocolates, Confectionery, Cheese, Coffee, Condiments, Culinary, Deodorants, Diary, Diapers, Edible Oils, Frozen Vegetables, Fabric wash, Grooming, Homecare, Haircare, Perfumes, Tea, Tissues and Pet Food. FMCG Market Experience: India, UAE, Oman, Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait, Yemen, Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, Ethiopia, Sudan, Nigeria.

Family Office Advisory

Michele Carby

Managing Partner·Holborn Assets LLC
LeadIbrahim Hemeida
Diagnosed problem medium

Family succession / generational wealth transition

Family succession and generational transition - full family-office build covering governance, succession, estate, concierge.

Contact

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACwAABTup6sBEjAnEHm1V5EmatkdMcOXiFbRwEc
Email: Best guess (unverified): michele@holbornassets.com verify in Hunter
Other patterns: michele.carby@holbornassets.com, mcarby@holbornassets.com

Background

Thank you for taking the time to look at my profile. I am a highly experienced financial adviser with licences to practice in the UK, Hong Kong, South Africa and my headquarters in the United Arab Emirates. I favour building long term relationships with my clients, helping them plan their finances to meet their long term goals. Clients' objectives vary considerably because people are different and striving for vastly varied outcomes in life. Even when it comes to universal financial needs like pensions, savings plans and insurance, their needs are never precisely the same as someone else's. That's why everyone needs that personalised service and attention. Throughout my career, I have assisted thousands of clients. I have developed professional relationships with all kinds of professionals in finance and related fields; investment and fund managers, lawyers, accountants, insurers, technical experts and government departments. Working with international expatriates means that some financial issues can be fiendishly complicated, particularly tax and inheritance planning, domiciles and jurisdictions. It is my job to filter that for the clients and help them understand their available choices. My guiding principle is that I am only successful when my clients succeed - it ensures our objectives and interests remain perfectly aligned. That way of doing things is the foundation on which I built my career and practice. It's the reason why I have retained so many clients spread across the world for so many years and why they write and say such nice things about me. If that sounds like the sort of service you want for your finances, please visit my website michelecarby.com for more information. Or you can contact me here on LinkedIn, by email at michele.carby@holbornassets.com or by calling +971 50 618 6463 I look forward to hearing from you. Michele

Background

I bring over 20 years of experience in procurement and supply chain management across various sectors, including electro-mechanical, hospitality, real estate, and oil and gas. Currently, I serve as the Head of Procurement at Master Power Systems Limited, a leading company operating in Kenya and Uganda. I hold a Certified Purchasing Professional (CPP) certification and a CIPS Affiliate Membership, along with an MBA in International Business, reflecting my commitment to professional excellence and ethical practices. My key competencies encompass strategic planning, leadership, global sourcing, costing, budgeting, and executing MEP projects. I manage procurement for diverse initiatives, from facilities management and MEP construction to oil and gas maintenance and hospitality development. I negotiate with vendors to secure the best prices and deals, leveraging purchasing power and economies of scale. Additionally, I collaborate with business development and finance teams to establish sales strategies and budgets that align with market conditions and opportunities. I am dedicated to delivering quality, efficiency, and innovation in every project I oversee.

Email: Verified: jack.pallen@holbornassets.com (Hunter score: 97)

Background

I help expats achieve financial freedom and secure their financial future. Whether creating passive income, planning for retirement, building wealth, or funding children’s education. I offer tailored investment solutions, including: • Off-Plan Property Investments in Dubai and the UK • Citizenship and Residency by Investment (Europe, US, and Caribbean) • US Property and Land Investments • Loan Notes and Structured Property Investments • Real Estate Investment Trusts (REITs) and Property Funds • Tax-Efficient Regular Savings Plans • Lump-Sum Investments • Professionally Managed Portfolios • Education Fee Planning • Retirement Planning • Pension Planning • Inheritance Tax Planning • Estate Planning and Legacy Planning • Trust Funds and Child Trust Funds • Life Insurance • Wills • Foreign Exchange Solutions • International Mortgages • Cash Flow Modelling • Budgeting • UK and Swiss Pension Transfers • US 401(k) and IRA Solutions Whether you’re looking to create passive income, secure your family’s future, diversify your investments, or achieve financial independence, I can help. Let’s connect to explore how I can support your goals.

Holborn Assets is a leading international financial services company spanning 25 Global Offices, 250 qualified Wealth Managers and 700 employees servicing over 20,000 clients worldwide with assets in excess of $3billion AUM. LeadSteven Downey

Contact

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACwAABHgbEEBqqdLyIXp4wFqUokrsfa30b7-IQQ
Email: Best guess (unverified): veera@easasalehalgurg.com verify in Hunter
Other patterns: veera.rimmalapudimscmcips@easasalehalgurg.com, vrimmalapudimscmcips@easasalehalgurg.com

Background

As a Manager (Procurement & Supply Chain) with over 15 years of experience, I have delivered outstanding results in strategic sourcing, cost-saving initiatives, supplier performance management, and quality improvement for blue-chip, multinational companies. I have a global market knowledge and a strategic mindset that enable me to source materials and services that underpin the competitive positioning and operational excellence of the business. Most recently, I was the Procurement Manager at MAC AL GURG (BMD), where I led a team of four and reported to the Head of Supply Chain. I set the strategy for procurement of materials for diversified plants at four locations, encompassing raw materials, process chemicals, packing materials and services. I slashed procurement costs by 15%, elevated supplier quality by 20%, reduced supplier delivery time by 30%, drove excess stock levels down by 20%, and increased the use of environmentally friendly suppliers by 25%. I also digitalised the procurement process and implemented Lean Six Sigma principles to enhance efficiency and effectiveness. I hold a PG Diploma in Materials Management and a B.Tech in Chemical Engineering (both WES verified), coupled with MCIPS Chartered Status and Lean Six Sigma Green Belt Certification. I am currently pursuing a Master’s in Supply Chain Management & Logistics at Coventry University in the UK and the CMI L7 Certificate in Strategic Management & Leadership Practice. I am passionate about continuous professional development and learning new skills and best practices in my field. I am looking for a new challenge where I can leverage my skills and credentials to set the global strategic sourcing vision of a large multinational corporate. I am motivated by opportunities to implement cost-saving initiatives, digitalise procurement processes, and build long-term partnerships with suppliers and stakeholders. I am a collaborative, adaptable, and results-oriented leader who thrives in fast-paced and dynamic environments.

Yannis Karipsiadis

Senior Wealth Adviser | Web3 Infrastructure | Mass Adoption & Pre-IPO Tech Deals·Holborn Assets LLC
Diagnosed problem medium

Family succession / generational wealth transition

Family succession and generational transition - full family-office build covering governance, succession, estate, concierge.

Contact

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACwAAAAhZHEBqWnH_-eNtvLD7Y8VlGrZkOw3Tr4
Email: Verified: yannis.karipsiadis@holbornassets.com (Hunter score: 97)

Background

Legacy starts today, right now, with the next decision we make! It isn’t defined by what we leave behind, but by the financial decisions we make while we are still here. Too often, legacy is treated as a final chapter — something to consider after success has already been achieved. In reality, legacy is active. It lives in how capital is structured, how risk is managed, how assets are diversified, and how values are transmitted across generations. As a wealth advisor, I work with individuals and family offices to design diversified, resilient portfolios aligned with long-term purpose — not just short-term performance.Because statistics are clear: most wealth does not survive beyond the second or third generation. Preservation requires structure. Growth requires discipline. Continuity requires intention. This is not just portfolio management.This is intentional legacy architecture — built through strategic allocation, governance, and multi-generational planning. If wealth is created with effort, it should be transferred with intelligence.

Background

With more than 15 years' experience in asset management, with a specific focus on Private Markets, I am currently Acting CIO for the Al Futtaim Family Office. I am a CFA charterholder and hold Master's degrees in Management from KEDGE Business School and in Financial Engineering from SKEMA Business School. My mission is to manage the liquid and illiquid portfolios of the family office. On the private asset side, I build and monitor a diversified portfolio of private equity, private debt, real estate and infrastructure funds in North America and Europe, selecting the most attractive opportunities and carrying out co-investments and secondary transactions. I also set up risk and performance reporting, as well as cash flow projections. Thanks to my strategic vision and in-depth knowledge of the markets, I have helped generate superior returns for my companies.

Background

Senior Corporate Communications Leader with 15+ years of experience leading integrated internal and external communications across multi-entity, multi-region organizations in the Middle East. My work spans corporate and leadership communications, brand reputation management, strategic content development, and stakeholder engagement.Currently, I partner closely with CEO and C-suite leadership to shape narratives, drive alignment, and deliver high-impact communications that support business objectives. I lead teams across communications and design, overseeing strategy, execution, and governance across regions and platforms.With a Master’s in Communication, I bring a structured, thoughtful approach to storytelling, translating complex priorities into clear, credible and consistent messaging. FCIM solution

Full family office build covering governance, succession, estate, concierge, and direct deal access. Cross-border execution with discretion.

FCIM evidence

UAE Foundation as the family-control vehicle: Charter and By-laws set the founder’s decision rights, succession protocol, and distribution policy under federal-law backing. Combined with a CMA private fund underneath, the Foundation governs while the fund executes — separating control from operations.

Source: FCIM_Private_Funds.pdf, p.9 · ref fo-002

Family succession / generational wealth transition

Background

Father of two (26 & 9), CEO of InnovaBeyond, and on a mission to make HR and ESG actually useful instead of just buzzwords. I work at the intersection of sustainability, tech, and people. I’ve been in the game since floppy disks were a thing, and I still get excited about new tools (especially if they cut BS and emissions). You’ll find me leading ESG strategy in the Middle East, building bridges between Europe and the Gulf, and playing with AI like it’s LEGO. 💼 I’ve worked with Oracle HCM, SAP SuccessFactors, and Workday — but I don’t stop there. I geek out over AI, Blockchain, Chatbots, RPA, and VR/AR (not for the hype, but for the impact). ⚡ I design fast-paced, zero-fluff innovation labs for real business problems: - AI Discovery Workshops that go beyond ChatGPT hype and help teams actually use AI. - Cloud transitions that don’t take 12 months. - ESG roadmaps you can actually follow. - Recruiting and Learning, Finance labs that don’t bore people to death. - Corporate innovation that isn’t just post-its and pizza. And most importantly: STEP (Sustainability Transformation Enablement Program) — our signature journey at InnovaBeyond ESG. It helps companies move from ESG confusion to clarity, through practical tools, smart content, and a roadmap that doesn’t require a PhD or 18 months. It’s ESG with a human face — and sometimes a dad joke. I work with my wife and our partners in Italy — our version of a family business meets global consultancy. We move fast, think smart, and keep things human. Want to connect? You’ll get honesty, dry humour, and possibly a small lecture about why football is still good for kids, even if mine disagrees.

I specialize in shaping high performance cultures, succession planning, and leadership development within high pressure, fast moving environments. In addition to my corporate role, I serve as a career coach for HR and financial services professionals, guiding them to accelerate their career progression, and maximize their impact. I am passionate about enabling both organizations and the leaders within them to achieve sustainable growth and lasting success.

Background

With over 20 years of experience as a Human Capital Leader, I have had the privilege of working across various industries, focusing on strategic human capital management and driving transformational initiatives. Currently, I serve as the Group Chief Human Capital Officer ( GCHCO) at Easa Saleh Al Gurg Group—one of the region’s most prominent family-owned businesses, comprising over 30 companies across diverse sectors, including Consumer, Retail & Lifestyle, Industrial, Building Materials, Manufacturing, Real Estate, and Joint Ventures. Driving Strategic HR and Transformational initiatives, enhancing employee engagement in pursuing organizational objectives, Business Transformation, Organization Design, Efficiency improvement, Talent Management & Acquisition, and Leadership Development across high-growth, complex organizations. Successfully built and deployed a human capital strategy aligned with business strategy and stakeholder expectations. Driven transformation initiatives across group business units Professional Capability: • Seasoned Human Capital professional with hands-on experience in diverse industries operating across regions • Strategic professional with a profound understanding of HR and Strategic Business HR Alignment. • Proactive Change & transformation Agent who helps deploy a participative management style in a fast-paced, diverse workforce. Key Skills: Strategic HR, Stakeholder Management, Business HR, Change Management, organizational design & transformation, Analytical and Critical thinking, Complex decision-making, Building high performing teams, Talent Acquisition, Talent Management, Leadership Development, Succession Planning, Rewards & Benefits, Performance Management, Statutory Compliance, Organisation work Culture enhancement, Organisation brand, HR Technology landscape & people analytics

Background

“You Learn More from Failure Than Success. Don’t Let It Stop You. Failure Builds Character.” This a quote that has always found its manifestation in my efforts. I have a progressive track record with proven excellence in understanding the business issues and data challenges of the organization and industry. As a Group IT Operations Manager, I am driven by a deep passion for leveraging technology to empower organizations and drive operational excellence. With 15+ years of experience in managing and transforming IT infrastructure, I possess a proven track record of designing and implementing robust and scalable solutions that align with business objectives. I excel in leading cross-functional teams and aligning IT strategies with overall organizational goals. By understanding the unique needs of different departments, I develop and execute comprehensive infrastructure roadmaps that optimize performance, enhance security, and ensure seamless operations. I am skilled at driving digital transformation initiatives, leveraging cloud technologies, and integrating innovative solutions to streamline processes and enhance productivity. My leadership style is rooted in collaboration, transparency, and continuous improvement. I believe in fostering an environment that encourages open communication, knowledge sharing, and professional growth. By empowering my team members and providing them with the necessary tools and resources, I cultivate a culture of innovation and high performance. As a customer-centric professional, I prioritize delivering exceptional user experiences. I understand the importance of user satisfaction and work closely with stakeholders to identify their needs, align IT services accordingly, and provide prompt and effective support. I am experienced in managing vendor relationships, negotiating contracts, and ensuring service level agreements are met. Furthermore, I stay abreast of emerging technologies and industry trends, continuously evaluating their potential impact on the organization's IT infrastructure. I am committed to ongoing learning and professional development, holding certifications in relevant areas and actively participating in industry forums and conferences. I am passionate about working with & leading high-performing teams that leverage data, insights, and innovative technologies to drive business growth and operational excellence. Energetic and outgoing individual with a love for putting smiles on people’s faces and helping people in any way.

Background

I’m a UAE-based Wealth Manager and Financial Advisor at Holborn Assets, supporting individuals and families with structured planning across protection, retirement, education funding, and legacy goals. Before moving into wealth management, I spent 18+ years in senior operational and commercial roles, leading client advisory work, complex solution sales, and partner-led growth across the GCC and Levant. That background trained me to be rigorous on needs analysis, documentation, and long-cycle relationship management. My approach is consultative and process-driven: understand the full picture, quantify trade-offs, then build a plan that is practical to execute and review over time—while maintaining strong KYC/AML discipline throughout onboarding and servicing.

FCIM solution

EAM/FI platform with Confidential Client Money accounts at FAB. FCIM acts as secondary custodian; EAMs leverage platform for client mandates.

FCIM evidence general — service-level

EAM / FI Platform with Confidential Client Money accounts at FAB. FCIM acts as secondary custodian and SCA-regulated execution backbone; the EAM retains the client relationship and investment mandate. The structure replaces the operational burden of running a regulated SCA broker-dealer with a platform-as-a-service relationship.

Source: FCIM_Portfolio_Management_Service.pdf, p.5 · ref eam-001

Warm path

Amr Fergany via Credit Suisse DIFC alumni and Levantine professional networks in Dubai.

First step

Approach Joelle Rayess via Amr Fergany’s warm path.

Background

With over a decade and a half of experience in the investment management industry, I am a partner at Holborn Assets, a leading financial services company that offers tailored solutions to clients across the world. I am also a registered investment adviser, certified by SEBI, and an associate member of the Investment Migration Council, the global association for the investment migration industry. In addition, I am the managing director of Xumit Capital, a boutique firm that specializes in discretionary and cryptoasset portfolio management, as well as global investment and migration programs. I have successfully raised funds for various investment migration projects, working with Arton Capital, a leading global citizenship advisory firm. I have a strong track record of delivering high returns and diversification for my clients, using my analytical skills, trading expertise, and knowledge of the global markets. I hold an MBA in finance from Great Lakes Institute of Management, one of the top business schools in India.

Sam Instone

Chief Executive Officer & Founder·AES International
LeadSteven Downey

Email: Best guess (unverified): sam@aesinternational.com verify in Hunter
Other patterns: sam.instone@aesinternational.com, sinstone@aesinternational.com

Background

You've built wealth - but are you making the smartest decisions to protect it, grow it, and use it to create the future you want?True ‘Wealth Mastery’ isn't about net worth alone - it's about net worthwhile.It's about the clarity and confidence that comes from making consistently intelligent decisions and aligning your capital with a life well lived.Here you’ll find proven frameworks and practical insights on wealth, decision-making, and living richly - drawn from decades spent advising internationally accomplished families.The Economist described me as the ’Field Marshal of Finance.’ After leaving the British Army more than 22 years ago, I saw too many traditional firms prioritising product sales over client outcomes. So I built something different.Today, I counsel some of the world's most globally mobile and accomplished families.AES International is the only Certified Investment Fiduciary® firm serving the Middle East, Asia, and North Africa.A fiduciary is legally bound to act solely in your best interest.We help globally mobile, wealthy families make better, more consequential decisions across three critical dimensions:Mind: Mental models and decision frameworks used by the most successful families.Money: Mastering each of the nine domains of wealth.Meaning: Evidence-based systems that transform financial success into clarity, freedom and a deeply fulfilling life. Who we work with:We intentionally serve a limited number of international families to ensure exceptional focus and judgement. Typically, families with $3M or more in investable assets who have outgrown conventional advice and want a more thoughtful, strategic approach.Begin here: Discover your Money Personality: → https://n8iixb63dj4.typeform.com/AES-MPInsights on YouTube:→ https://www.youtube.com/@SamInstoneAES All views expressed are my own and do not represent those of any company. Any opinions, ideas, or tips shared are for information purposes only and should not be taken as financial advice, a recommendation, or an offer to invest. Any financial promotions are likewise intended solely for informational purposes and do not constitute personal financial or tax advice. All rights reserved.

Background

Most globally mobile professionals face the same issue. Their wealth ends up scattered across multiple jurisdictions with no single, structured strategy behind it. Even high achievers often feel they lack full clarity and control. I advise international executives and professionals living and working across borders who want a unified view of their wealth and a long-term structure designed to keep pace with their global careers. My background is in complex wealth planning for high-net-worth individuals with assets, pensions and commitments in multiple regions including the US, UK & Europe. I hold advanced advisory qualifications and operate with a cross-border perspective, helping clients bring structure and foresight to multi-jurisdiction wealth decisions. I believe successful people do not need more financial noise. They need clarity, strategic thinking and a trusted partner who can bring order to complexity. I share insights on structure, clarity and long-term wealth strategy for globally mobile professionals. If that resonates, feel free to connect or follow.

Background

As Head of IT with 15 years of experience, I am a dedicated technology leader with a fervour for driving innovation and transformation across a diverse range of industries. My career has been defined by a commitment to harnessing advanced technologies to foster business growth and enhance customer experiences. My expertise lies in integrating AI and automation into enterprise systems, enabling organisations to streamline operations and achieve unparalleled efficiency. I am well-versed in fintech and wealth tech, where I have led the implementation of secure, scalable solutions that are reshaping the financial services landscape. Additionally, I have a profound understanding of the unique challenges and opportunities within the realms of education technology and media technology, where I focus on delivering transformative solutions that are pioneering the future of learning and content delivery. Throughout my career, I have been at the cutting edge of technology adoption, consistently demonstrating the ability to convert complex IT strategies into actionable, results-driven initiatives. My approach is rooted in strategic planning, project management, and team leadership, with a focus on leveraging technology to resolve real-world issues and deliver tangible value. I possess extensive experience in managing complex IT infrastructures, encompassing network management, software development, cloud computing, and cybersecurity. My proficiency in data analytics enables me to derive actionable insights that inform decision-making and drive innovation. As a lifelong learner, I stay abreast of the latest technological trends, ensuring that my strategies and solutions remain ahead of the curve. I adopt a futuristic yet pragmatic approach to IT leadership, concentrating on practical applications of emerging technologies to deliver concrete results. In my role, I am committed to cultivating a culture of excellence and continuous improvement. I relish challenges and am eager to leverage my experience and expertise to drive digital transformation, optimise operations, and achieve strategic objectives for your organisation.

Contact

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACwAAADLIRIB1Ggd8oGBWAblQd37lPSEiifmcZ4
Email: Best guess (unverified): guillermo@holbornassets.com verify in Hunter
Other patterns: guillermo.martorellsnchez@holbornassets.com, gmartorellsnchez@holbornassets.com

Background

Senior Wealth Manager with more than 20 years of diversified experience in Asset Management and Wealth Management in Holborn Assets in UAE. Specialist areas include expatriate financial advice on Financial Planning, Real Estate, Citizenship by investment and TAX. Holborn is a global financial services group and a leading financial advisory firm based in Dubai. Established in the Emirates for over 25 years, the business has expanded to operate throughout Europe, the Middle East, Asia and Africa. With a passion for people, the community and the financial markets, knowledge and experience also includes developing, I was coaching a network of more than 40 brokers within a period of 4 years. Specialities: 1- Global macro with fundamentals: I search global financial markets for extremely out of favour sectors that are fundamentally mispriced, and look set to change. 2-Theme based investing:I invest in sectors when it is a question of when (and not if) they recover. I generally have up to ten sectors/themes in play at any time. 3-Asymmetric Risk: Reward decision: If I can’t see an “easy” 2:1 or better return from a theme or sector, I simply won’t invest. This "portfolio" strategy is one way I manage risk. 4-Reduction of Risk Through Position Sizing: I invest in many small positions to gain a broad exposure to a theme, and effectively eliminate risk to any one security. 5-Non-Correlated to Major Indices: By the nature of my contrarian views, my positions mean very little correlation with the Dow, or the major market indices. 6-Arbitraging The Market's Impatience: The 24/7 feed and pressure on money managers to hit quarterly targets means few can apply a long term view - this is something I exploit.

FCIM solution

EAM/FI platform with Confidential Client Money accounts at FAB. FCIM acts as secondary custodian; EAMs leverage platform for client mandates.

FCIM evidence general — service-level

EAM / FI Platform with Confidential Client Money accounts at FAB. FCIM acts as secondary custodian and SCA-regulated execution backbone; the EAM retains the client relationship and investment mandate. The structure replaces the operational burden of running a regulated SCA broker-dealer with a platform-as-a-service relationship.

Source: FCIM_Portfolio_Management_Service.pdf, p.5 · ref eam-001

Other patterns: damodhar.mata@nexusinsurancebrokers.com, dmata@nexusinsurancebrokers.com

Background

► WHAT I DO: I help busy couples in UAE plan & build a financial future they would love to live in. WITHOUT complex financial products & risky investment strategies. ► HOW I DO IT: I have built The GAiM Plan - a comprehensive financial planning, investment advisory & portfolio management system. It helps my clients - Understand where they stand in terms of their money - Visualize where they want to be in the future - Build & Implement an action plan to get there - Measure progress & make corrections when necessary ► WHY IT WORKS: As a financial advisor with over a decade’s experience, I have worked with 300+ families from 50+ countries on Holistic Financial Planning, Investments & Protecting against loss of income. The GAiM plan works because it is a systematic approach to wealth accumulation & legacy creation. It helps you focus on progress along with growth, stay focussed on your goals & achieve them with much ease & confidence. SERVICES I PROVIDE: 1. Holistic Financial Planning 2. Children’s higher education planning 3. Investments - Passive Income & Growth 4. Retirement Planning 5. Life & Critical Illness Insurance 6. Key Person Insurance & Business Protection YOU CAN ALSO FIND ME ON 💡 Amazon - As the author of the Book 8 steps to financial independence 💡 Gulf news, Khaleej Times & The National I WORK WITH : ⭐ Business Owners, Partners & Directors for Key Person Insurance & International Medical insurance ⭐ Busy Couples - Financial Planning, Child Education Planning & Investments ⭐ Pre retirees & Retirees: build a robust retirement corpus. Preserve wealth & gain regular passive income WHAT OTHERS SAY: 🗣 “I've known and worked with Damodhar for over a decade and his level of commitment and professionalism is unmatched. Have multiple investment plans with him and would refer anyone who needs advice on insurance products to him without a second thought” Mohammed Hussain Damodhar Ashok is one of the best financial advisor every I come across. He always there to help and show his professionalism & support.He also Guide & help me to learn area of investments. Would like to have more investments in future with his expertise. Natesan Velayutham READY TO TALK? Connect with me here on LinkedIn! Book a virtual coffee at a time that works for you. https://www.financialplanningindubai.com/meetings/damodhar #FinancialPlanning #Investments #FinancialPlanner #FinancialAdvisorinDubai #InvestinginDubai #LifeInsuranceinDubai #LifeInsuranceinUAE #NRIMoney #NRIInvestment #KeyManInsurance #LifeInsurance #WealthAccumulation #FinancialFreedom

Email: Best guess (unverified): kayanush@aesinternational.com verify in Hunter
Other patterns: kayanush.pastakia@aesinternational.com, kpastakia@aesinternational.com

Background

15+ years in People & Culture across financial services and global business services. The work I'm proud of is hiring well, developing people, building cultures that work, and keeping the right people for the long term. Three core beliefs:1) Done well, this work moves the business forward. Done badly, it's noise.2) P&C is strategic, not admin. Outputs should be simple, sharp, and measurable.3) AI belongs in the people function. I use it across recruiting, role design, candidate intelligence, and analytics. Culture Index-trained. Innermetrix-trained. SHRM-SCP candidate (2026). Always happy to connect with fellow P&C and HR practitioners. And for any candidate reading this: I work at AES International in Dubai – a DFSA-authorised, FCA-regulated, CEFEX-certified fiduciary advice firm. We're one of the few firms in the region built around evidence-based, advice-led financial life planning. If that sounds like a place you'd want to work, send me a message.

Background

Greetings From Chaminda Desilva, Nexus Insurance Brokers! A highly accomplished and result driven seasoned financial planning manager with over 27 years of in depth experience covering all aspects of Banking with a greater emphasis on Relationship Banking, Financial Planning, Credit Management, Customer Service and Trade Finance. Leverages finely-honed interpersonal and time management skills to successfully manage key accounts and increase market value, achieving corporate goals and objectives. Background

Currently Chief Commercial Officer at Holborn Assets, one of the largest and fastest growing global financial advisory firms where I oversee global expansion, company strategy, licensing, product development and multi-market M&A. Founder and Executive Director of Kensington Fund Partners, a Dublin-regulated asset management firm specialising in cross-border investment solutions. Founder of Trinity Capital Partners, a UK-based wealth advisory firm directly authorised by the FCA, offering fully compliant investment advice and financial planning to HNW and UHNW clients. Trinity is strategically positioned to bridge traditional wealth advisory with next-gen investment products. Recognised by International Investment for both strategic innovation and leadership. Proven track record scaling operations, developing go-to-market strategies, and leading diverse commercial teams in regulated environments. Passionate about the convergence of traditional wealth management and digital assets. Currently exploring regional licensing pathways and institutional partnerships in the crypto and Web3 sectors. London Institute of Banking and Finance - DipFA Level 4 Winner of International Investments Global Emerging Talent award 2019 Winner of International Investments Personality of the year 2022
